text: My daily routine is built around consistency. Every morning, I wake up at 6:30 a.m., drink a glass of water, and go for a 20-minute run before breakfast. After that, I shower and eat a healthy meal. My work schedule starts at 9 a.m. and ends at 5 p.m., with a short break for lunch. In the afternoon, I often take a quick walk to refresh my mind. In the evening, I usually cook dinner, read a book or watch a TV show, and then relax. I try to go to bed by 10:30 p.m. to keep my energy high. This routine helps me stay productive and balanced every day.
